٥y Ihe DIOSEcUIi٥٨ witnesses committing alleged olence that the offence of committing theft or oil Irom main oil uansmission pipeline of PARCP nOt an ordinary offence In suppon of their contentions tney have relied upon the case of Raza Muhammad The State (2D17 P Cr LJ Not3 47).
